flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Metropolitan College of New York fell 45% between 2021 and 2024 (36.4% → 20.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Metropolitan College of New York are 3% above 6-year earnings ($45.1k → $46.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Metropolitan College of New York rose 101% between 2021 and 2024 (21.3% → 42.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Metropolitan College of New York fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
